faqs.question: What are the jobs available after studying design?
faqs.answer:
Fashion Designer, Textile Designer, Accessory Designer, Interior Designer, Graphic Designer, Web Designer, Game Designer, and Furniture Designer are some of the job profiles available after studying design courses. Designer pay may vary depending on a number of factors, including cities or demand. Your degree's worth may differ between cities. There are more offices and enterprises in big cities, which increases your chances of finding work.
Graduates in design have a wide range of employment possibilities.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for Amrita School of Architecture UG courses?
faqs.answer: Amrita School of Architecture offers only one UG course, i.e., BArch. The seat intake for this prorgamme is 40. Candidates can apply directly for admission to the course on the official website of Amrita Vidyapeetham.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BArch at Amrita School of Architecture?
faqs.answer: Amrita School of Architecture offers BArch course for a duration of five years. The tuition fee for the programme is INR 15 lakh. For accomodation, students must pay a separate hostel fee of INR 4 lakh.

faqs.question: Who can apply to BArch at Amrita School of Architecture?
faqs.answer:
For admission to BArch programme, candidates need to fulfil any one of the following eligibility criteria:
Pass Class 12 with minimum 50% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics
Pass a three-year Diploma with Mathematics as compulsory subject

admission_process.title: Amrita School of Architecture Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Amrita School of Architecture admission 2025 isopen. Amrita Vidyapeetham's School of Architecture offers admission to a full-timeBArchprogramme at the UG level. Admission to this course is completely entrance-based. Candidates are admitted based on a valid score ofNATA.The application process atAmrita School of Architectureis conducted in online mode. Read on for more details around Amrita School of Architecture admissions in the article below.

Amrita School of Architecture admissions are based on a national-level exam conducted for admission to Architecture courses. Candidates must fulfil the basic eligibility criteria for admission toAmrita School of Architecture courses. Tabulated below are the detailed eligibility and selection criteria related to Amrita School of Architecture course admission
- Pass Class 12 with minimum 50% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics
- Pass a three-year Diploma with Mathematics as compulsory subject
Check below the detailed steps for Amrita School of Architecture admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process

For admission to Amrita School of Architecture, candidates must apply online on the official website of Amrita Vidyapeetham for their desired programme. Along with filling the application form, candidates must submit the relevant documents and pay an application fee.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Amrita School of Architecture admissions are entrance-based. The college shortlists students based on their merit of the last qualifying exam of Class 12. Further, the final selection is done based on a valid NATA score.
Step 3: Final Admission
After the completion of all the selection rounds, the selected candidates must pay a course fee to confirm their seats.

college_info.intro:
SunRise University's popular programmes are MBA and BSc. The university offers an MBA programme to students across several specialisations, such as Operations, Business, Finance, Agri-Business, Fashion Design, and others. SunRise University MBA students can work as Business Analysts, Finance Managers, Compliance Analysts, Market Research Analysts, Agricultural Managers, and others.
SunRise University is one of the eminent institutes which offers quality education to students. individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good Faculty but Limited Placement Support, and College Experience Lacks.

content.Placements: In my course, 10% of students are placed, with the highest package being 15 LPA, the minimum at 5 LPA, and the average at 8 LPA. 5% of students secured internships at J. Sagar Associates as associate legal interns and at Luthra and Luthra as legal interns. The top roles offered for my course are in the judiciary.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are good, but overall facilities are lacking. The classrooms are decent. In the hostels, the quality of food is good, but medical facilities are lacking. For sports, we have a cricket field, a running track, and a basketball court. There is a dedicated park for girls and boys for yoga, along with a gym for both. Additionally, we have a table tennis setup at my college.

admission_overview.college_name: SunRise University Course Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: Sunrise University admissionsare merit-based. The university conducts an entrance test for admission to PhD courses.Sunrise Universityoffers varied undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral-level programs in the fields of Teaching and education, Mass Communication and Media, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, Arts, Engineering, Law, Commerce, and IT and software.

The university offers admission to candidates considering their merit in the last qualifying exam. Besides, aspirants applying for PhD have to pass the entrance exam conducted by the university. Below areSunrise University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Sunrise admission criteria is a multi-step procedure. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the steps mentioned below to understand theSunrise University admission process:
STEP 1: Sunrise University Application Process 2025
To apply for admission to University, candidates need to fill out the online application form available on the university's website. They can also download or collect the form from the campus.
STEP 2: Selection

The university evaluates the applications of the candidates for educational qualification. The merit of the candidate's in the previous qualifying exam is considered for admission. For PhD, the university conducts an entrance test.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

After the candidates submit their applications, the university reviews them and makes an admission decision. They are informed of the decision via email or the university website. Further, aspirants have to pay theSunrise University feeto confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Does Sun Rise University accept CAT score ?

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Sc course to attempt Rajasthan JET Agriculture exam?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed their Senior Secondary (Class 12) examination from the Board of Secondary Education Rajasthan, Ajmer, or other recognised statutory boards are considered eligible for attempting JET in Agriculture. The eligible subject combinations will be:AgricultureBiologyChemistryMathematicsPhysicsThese combinations can again be depicted as ABC, PCM, PCB, PCMB, PCA, etc. To appear for the test, candidates must have passed all these subjects in Science or Agriculture streams with a minimum specified marks requirement, which usually is 50% for general categories and 45% for reserved categories.

placement_data.title: Sun Rise University Placement overview
paragraphs: Sun Rise University Faqs:

tables.context: What job profiles can I apply for in the governmen
data: Government Job Profiles for BSc Graduates

faqs.question: How can I get a job after completing BA?
faqs.answer: You'll have countless career options after your BA, so here's the list: Giving government exams i.e. giving UPSC, SSC and Banking exam. Pursuing a career in law field- It'll take another 3 years. Fashion/Interior Designing- I do not have much knowledge about how to go about this, but you can definitely go with this Translator- French, German, Spanish and what not are available for BA. You just need to select the correct college which offers you different languages. Psychologist- Sadly, this option is only open if you've taken psychology as your major. Economist- Again, if you opted for economics as a major in BA. But I have a few friends who aspire to become economists. Historian- Same thing again. Journalist- Currently, electronic media is everything. Film Industry- We all know that Bollywood is not all about actors. You have a lot of people working. There are directors, makeup artists, editors, etc. You can join the sales department of a firm. You can also pursue MBA and get a good job.

faqs.question: What is the average salary after pursuing D Pharmacy course?
faqs.answer: Most organizations can offer a pay scale for DPharm fresh graduates from INR 3 Lacs to INR 4 lakh per annum. Initially, new joiner will keep training or probation position, after which their pay scale would be revised. Post that new employees can find a salary in range of INR 5 Lacs - INR 7 Lacs. After gaining experience or higher education qualifications, a person can become a Pharmaceutical Executive or Laboratory Scientist whereby their salary would be in range of INR 7 Lacs - INR 9 lakh. Hence, it is a fruitful career option that has good salary pay scales with additional perks.

faqs.question: What are the career options available after completing a BCom degree course?
faqs.answer: BCom course is the gateway to job opportunities in several fields such as Accounting, Finance, Economics, Taxation, Insurance, etc. One can become an Accountant, Financial Analyst, Auditor, etc. after graduating with a BCom degree. This degree is also beneficial to those students who want to run their own businesses. Because of the variety of work prospects it gives, BCom is one of the most popular undergraduate educational programmes. Commerce is the nation's most important industry, and it has a huge impact on the economy. The expanding economy has resulted in a variety of job opportunities in the business sector. As a result, a Bachelor of Commerce degree can lead to a lucrative career.

faqs.question: What job profiles can I apply for in the government sector after completing B.Sc from Sunrise University?
faqs.answer: There are various job opportunities for BSc graduates in the government sector. Sunrise University BSc passouts can look for job notifications on the official website of the respective department. Mentioned below are some of the popular job profiles for BSc degree holders in the government sector: Government Job Profiles for BSc Graduates Research Scientist Clinical Research Specialist Lab Technician Assistant Nurse Forest Department- IFS Officer Biochemist FCI- Trainee RBI Grade B Officer SBI PO

reviews.review_heading: Good Faculty but Limited Placement Support, and College Experience Lacks.
reviews.review_text: The labs are good, but overall facilities are lacking. The classrooms are decent. In the hostels, the quality of food is good, but medical facilities are lacking. For sports, we have a cricket field, a running track, and a basketball court. There is a dedicated park for girls and boys for yoga, along with a gym for both. Additionally, we have a table tennis setup at my college.

reviews.review_heading: Foundation of your future.
reviews.review_text:
Good facilities and excellence infrastructure are available for student in my campus. The big classrooms and library, as well as large labs are fine and there is a good internet connection. The mess and canteen are good and hostel has fine and medical facilities. Also, fine sport and games are exciting.
.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with this college because of its faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. The library and classrooms are in good condition. Proper lab classes are conducted. The hostel is good. I am satisfied with the hostel. The food served in the hostel is good and hygienic. The hostel rooms are equipped with beds, lockers, and washrooms. Sports and games are conducted in our college.

reviews.review_heading: University is good and campus is green.
reviews.review_text: The university's infrastructure is excellent. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are in good working order. The library is filled with books and is very peaceful. On campus, there are numerous sports facilities. The hostel is in good condition, but very few students stay here because the majority of students are locals. The mess is clean, and the food is adequate.

reviews.review_heading: Review for B.Com doing college of Sunrise University .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is huge and the central library is available with the good books. All the facilities like Wi-Fi connection, laboratory, grounds and annual fest available in our campus. Quality of the food our canteen is also hygienic and having variety.

reviews.review_heading: College and faculty members are good, and it is worth for getting admission.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are available for all courses. Classrooms are well-established, and the library has one of the best collections in Alwar. Quality of the hostel is very good, and they provide good food and accommodation. They also provide medical facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Sunrise University Alwar is located in a village which is 20 km away from Alwar city.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi service was available, and we also had highly constructed practical labs. The mess served different types of food like rice, roti and dal. The food menu changed every week. The environment on the campus was good t live. Every year, games and events were held.

reviews.review_heading: The staff members were good during our course duration, i.e., from the academic year 2014-2017.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was average. Wi-Fi facility was not available. Commerce students don't need a lab. Classrooms were average, and the library was pretty good with Wi-Fi and other facilities. Hostel rooms were average, but the food served was good as compared to government universities. The canteen was also good and had a stationery shop in it. The medical facility provided was also good, and the university had a large playground with lots of sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Overall for study this university is very good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this university is very big with a ground. The Wi-Fi medical and sports facilities is very amazing they also have a big classrooms. Library is also there with many books the quality of classrooms and labs are very nice, food quality is not so good but they have a huge range. Hostel rooms is okay.

reviews.review_heading: A good college to learn and improve your skills in any field a person wants to grow his/her career.
reviews.review_text: We were provided with good facilities. Labs, classrooms, library and all facilities are upto date with projectors in every classroom. We have a canteen which provides good quality food for every student and faculty members. Sports and games classes were provided to all the students including the faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: Average college because of the type of placements offered.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi networks are available for most of the times in college. The college classroom are spacious but air flow or ventilation is low. The sports field is available and sports equipment are also available. First aid kit is available in the college. Certain insurance policy is available for the students of college.

reviews.review_heading: The college has helpful faculty and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is good. Every classroom is spacious. The garden of college is greenery with different plants as well as with trees. You can also get labs facilities in college. There were different labs for each subject. About medical and sports facilities, the university has medical rooms for the students for an emergency like kits and all.

reviews.review_heading: This university admission for only accepts money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is out of the area in Alwar district. Nobody lives here. There are farmers only. There is no transport that can reach the college. There is no other education department in that area. So can't take admission in the university. Sunrise university is fake.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and students and staffs.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college very minimalistic and vibrant Wi-Fi networks are everywhere in college. There is big ground in the entrance back side is playing field. Food quality of canteen was good and hostel rooms were very good maintenance we didn't face any issues while residing in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: If you are in Alwar, then this is the place to go.
reviews.review_text: There is no on-campus Wi-Fi facility for the students. There are various labs on the campus as per the requirements of the courses being offered by the college. The college provides the medical facilities and sports as well. The labs are fully equipped, but only 20% of the classes have the projectors installed. The food quality is good, but only limited variety is kept. I have never been in the hostel.

college_info.intro: The institute offers a two-year flagship Post-Graduate Programme in Management (PGP), Post Graduate Program for Experienced Professionals (PGPEx), a weeklong (5 working day) International immersion programme, an 18 months Post Graduate Program in Digital Governance and Management (PGP-DGM) in blended learning mode under the sponsorship of the Ministry of Electronics & IT (MeitY), Government of India and PhD in Management. It also offers professional development training programmes like Technical Education Quality Improvement Programs (TEQIP) for faculty members of technical institutions from across the country. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Candidates willing to get admission to various courses at IIM Visakhapatnam must take part in the IIM Visakhapatnam admission process before the last date of application. At the PG level, the college offers MBA, Executive MBA, and various other courses to students. The institute also offers PhD courses to the students. Aspiring candidates must qualify the eligibility criteria set by the university for the desired course. Below mentioned are some of the IIM Visakhapatnam courses and IIM Visakhapatnam fees:

faqs.answer: A:    The total fees of the EMBA course at IIM Visakhapatnam is INR 10.8 lakh.
faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for the EMBA programme at IIM Visakhapatnam?

faqs.answer: A:    The total fees of the MBA course at IIM Visakhapatnam is INR 17.22 lacs. This fees has been taken from unofficial online sources.
faqs.question: What is the cost of MBA in IIM Vizag?

faqs.answer: A:    IIM Visakhapatnam admission to the PGDM courses like MBA are conducted through CAT aggregate percentile. For getting into a prestigious IIMs like IIM Bombay, IIM Kharagpur, One need to score a percentile of more than 98. However, if you score nearly 92 to 95, you will mostly get few IIMs like IIM - Vizag, Jammu, Nagpur, Amritsar, etc. and if you get above 95 percentile, then you can expect a call from better IIMs like Kashipur, Ranchi, etc. So, it is quite obvious that because of stiff competition, you won't get admission into IIMs with a percentile of 90. With the growing competition every year, students must target more than 95 percentile for ensuring their chances of selection.
faqs.question: Can I get into IIM Visakhapatnam with 90 percentile?

faqs.answer: A:    IIM Visakhapatnam does not charge any separate application fees for its PGP/ MBA programme. Candidates are just required to pay CAT exam application fees which is INR 2,400 for General, EWS and NC-OBC candidates. For the SC/ ST/ PwD category candidates, the application fees is INR 1,200. Also the institution has its own separate application for non-CAT courses like PGPEX, where the application fee is INR 1,000 (INR 500 for NC-OBC/ EWS and SC, ST, PwD category candidates and women candidates are exempt from the application fee).
faqs.question: What is the application fee at IIM Visakhapatnam?

review_content.General: The campus is newly built with all modern amenities. The vicinity in which the campus is located is quite desolate. Facilities are still under construction, so constant construction noise disturbs. The location is very far from the main city, with limited options for cabs and online orders. Networks like Airtel have issues on campus, but the newly built library has all study materials. I receive a single occupancy room with AC, fan, almirah, cupboard, mattress, a 7-foot-long mirror, a whiteboard, and a pinboard, with daily room cleaning facilities. Food is mostly South Indian, but we receive chicken three days a week.

reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: In my college, every student got a job with a good salary package. Packages like 40 LPA are high; this is the top role offered in our course, and 7 LPA is low, while 15 LPA is the average in our courses. Top recruiting companies like Symbiosis Technology, Wipro Limited, etc., offered jobs to 100% of students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are very impressive for our courses and departments. 24*7 Wi-Fi is present, labs, classrooms, and the library are fine; there are no other words. Yes, the hostel is pretty good. The mess provides very hygienic varieties of food, although it is costly. Medical facilities and sports/games are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Programme (PGP) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: IIM Visakhapatnam is a perfect place to pursue a financial degree.

review_content.Placements: The course I opted for at IIM Visakhapatnam was PGP. The placement percentage was very good. Almost 100% of students got placed. Companies like Amazon and Flipkart visited the college for placements, offering roles such as financial manager. The highest package offered was 90 LPA, with an average package around 25 LPA. Almost every student gets an internship in their final year with good companies with proper stipends.
review_content.Infrastructure: As we all know, IIM campuses were well-equipped with all the future amenities. I really miss my campus a lot. The infrastructure of classrooms and hostels were excellent and maintained in a proper and neat manner. The food available was great and hygienic, and all facilities like sports, a medical center, and a supermarket were present inside the campus.

faqs.answer: Post Graduate Program in Management (PGP) is the flagship course offered by IIM Visakhapatnam. IIM Visakhapatnam offers various postgraduate and doctoral programmes such as PGP, PGPEx, PGPDGM, EMBA, PhD and MGNF. PGP is the flagship course offered by the institute. IIM Vizag admission to the PGP/MBA programmes is through Common Admission Test (CAT) followed by a personal interview round. Moreover, for the doctoral-level programem candidate with a valid score of CAT/GMAT/GRE/GATE/JRF (NET)/CSIR (NET) are eligible to appy. Shortlisted candidates are invited for the interview round. IIM Visakhapatnam also offers scholarships to aspirants.

The college has improved its rank which is an indcation that IIM Visakhapatnam has overall made a vast improvement in the five parameters: Teaching, Learning and Resources (TLR) Research and Professional Practice (RP) Outreach and Inclusivity (OI) over a year. However, IIM Visakhapatnam PGP placements recorded during 2023 was 100%. Further, the the highest package and average package stood at INR 32.65 LPA and INR 16.61 LPA, respectively. PGP students with annual household income below INR 5 Lacs are eligible to apply for financial aid. IIM Vishakhapatnam MBA scholarships are merit-based and applicants are provided with 100% or 25% of financial aid as tuition fee waiver.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Programme (PGP) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: An overview of IIM Visakhapatnam.

content.Placements: IIM Visakhapatnam provides multiple opportunities and roles across different sectors. Start-ups and big MNCs come for placement opportunities. As per the function, companies do come for all different roles, such as marketing, finance, analytics, etc. The highest package last year was 42 LPA and the average package was 14–16 LPA. Almost 85% of students get placement opportunities here.
content.Infrastructure: A hostel is mandatory for every student. The best hostel facility is available on campus. Single-sharing room with AC, beds, and almirah. Study lamps and everything else that will be necessary for the next two years. All hostels have mesmerizing scenic views from their windows. Fridges, washing machines, induction, and clothing drying areas are available on every floor. Food is good in comparison to other foods. Breakfast, lunch, snacks and dinner are being provided, as well as special food on special occasions.

individual_reviews.title: Indian institute of management Visakhapatnam.

The highest package offered, as per the latest record, is 42 lakhs, and the average is 16.5 lakhs, with 50% of the batch falling above the average range. The top 25% receive approximately a 23 lakh package. The roles offered include analyst, wealth management trainee, senior analyst, finance analyst, IT consultant, etc. Top recruiters include ICICI Bank, Deloitte, KPMG, Yes Bank, EY, Anand Rathi, and Amul.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is newly built with all modern amenities. The vicinity in which the campus is located is quite desolate. Facilities are still under construction, so constant construction noise disturbs. The location is very far from the main city, with limited options for cabs and online orders. Networks like Airtel have issues on campus, but the newly built library has all study materials. Food is mostly South Indian, but we receive chicken three days a week.

All students get placed. IIM Visakhapatnam has a 100 percent placement rate My plan is to join the marketing department of a reputed company as a Brand Manager.
content.Infrastructure: Samaarambh is the annual cultural fest of IIM Visakhapatnam and is conducted in the month of February. There are a lot of books on Managerial subjects available in the library if someone wants to do an in-depth study other than the course material which is provided to them. Other than that there are journals, newspapers and magazines available as well. Even biographies of famous and successful personalities. The classrooms are tidy and have 2 Televisions, and 2 Projectors to view presentations and are well organized with even cameras which track and detect the movement of any lecturer for anyone who would like to view a lecture from a different classroom. A lot of sports and extra curricular activities can be undertaken on the campus with a world-class sports complex consisting of a gym, basketball court, football ground, Athletic track, cricket ground, Pool table and Table tennis area available. The Student Affair Council here is the vice of the students at IIM Visakhapatnam.

admission_overview.title: IIM Visakhapatnam Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: IIM Visakhapatnam admission 2025 is primarily entrance-based. The IIM Vizag application process is online. Admission to all the courses is completely entrance-based followed by an Interview round. Indian Institute of Management (IIM) Visakhapatnam offers various postgraduate and doctoral programmes such as PGP, PGPEx, PGPDGM, EMBA, PhD and MGNF. PGP is the flagship course offered by the institute. IIM Vizag admission to the PGP/ MBA programmes is through the Common Admission Test (CAT) followed by a Personal Interview round. Moreover, for PhD programme candidate with a valid score in CAT/ GMAT/ GRE/ GATE/ UGC-JRF/ CSIR(NET) are eligible to apply. As for the programme like the PGPDGM and PGPEx a valid score of either CAT/ GATE/ GMAT/ GRE or IIMV Test is applicable. Shortlisted candidates are invited for the Interview round for admission in various IIM Vizag courses.

IIM Visakhapatnam admission eligibility criteria is a Bachelor's degree for the postgraduate programme and a Master's or PG Diploma for PhD programme. IIM Visakhapatnam accepts the scores of CAT/ GATE/ GRE/ GMAT and various other entrance tests for admission in various programmes. paragraphs: IIM Visakhapatna admission process 2025is ongoing, and the Interview calls will be out soon.IIM Vizag admission 2025is entirely entrance-based as the institute accepts the scores and percentile scores of various entrance examinations such as CAT/ GMAT/GRE/ IIMV Test, etc. for admission in various courses. For admission to PGP, candidates are shortlisted based on the valid CAT scores, which match the cutoff for admission at IIM Vizag. For other programme likePhDandPGPEX, applications can be directly submitted through IIM Visakhapatnam website. IIM Vizag admission is conducted in phase wise manner. Find below theIIM Vizag admission process 2025:
STEP 1: IIM Visakhapatnam Application Process 2025

Indian Institute of Management Visakhapatnam application processis carried out in online mode. Candidates need to completeCAT registrationon iimcat.ac.in for admission to PGP, EMBA and PGPDGM programmes. For PhD and PGPEx courses, applications are accepted via IIM Vizag's official website. Once theCAT resultsare announced, candidates are required to fill out a detailed online application form separately for theIIM Vizag MBA course.
STEP 2: Personal Interview

Candidates who fill out the online application form and meet the minimum percentile will be considered as 'Qualified Confirmed Candidates'. IIM Visakhapatnam will then calculate the weighted scores based on CAT, Class 10, Class 12, Bachelor's degree, Diversity and Wok Experience and will give the Interview calls and candidates will then be required to appear for the Personal Interview round. The interview round for the For PhD, PGPEX and PGPDGM programme is conducted after the release of the selection list.
STEP 3: Final Selection

IIM Vizag will then calculate the 'Final Aggregate Score' based on various parameters like Personal Interview, CAT, Class 10, Class 12, Bachelor's degree, Diversity and Work Experience and will give the final shortlist for MBA/ PGP.

The final selection for various programmes is based on certain parameters including CAT/ GMAT/GRE/ IIMV Test, Diversity, Technical Knowledge and Domain Experience, SOP, Professional References and Personal Interview scores.
STEP 4: Admission Confirmation
The selected candidates can confirm their seats/ admission by paying the required amount ofIIM Visakhapatnam MBA fees.

Note:Candidates who are shortlisted and interviewed by IIMs Bangalore, Kozhikode, Lucknow or Indore (only for their PGP/ PGPM programme) will not be required to appear for the Personal Interview at IIM Vizag. For these candidates, the average of their Personal Interview scores from the aforementioned IIMs will be used to calculate their Personal Interview score for IIM Visakhapatnam. CheckIIM Vizag Cutoffs.

IIM Vizag feesvary according to the programmes offered by the institute. Fees charged by IIM Visakhapatnam range betweenINR 10.8 lakhtoINR 16.5 lakh. Given below is the tabular representation ofIIM Visakhapatnam fees:

courses_data.name: IIM Visakhapatnam EMBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: IIM Visakhapatnam provides a 2-year Executive MBA (EMBA) course to students. Students who are Indian nationals and also residing in India only & who have a min. of 3-year Bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% marks or equal CGPA (45% for NC-OBC/ EWS category candidates & 40% for SC/ ST/ PwD category candidates) & who have a min. of 3 years of full-time work experience as on the closing date of the respective application window at an officer/ executive level or higher, as a professional, or as an entrepreneurecan apply for IIM Vizag EMBA programme. IIM Visakhapatnam EMBA admissionis based on a composite score of performance in the EMAT & PI (online mode). The final composite score is created based on 47.5% weight to EMAT & PI each & 5% will be awarded to Female & Transgender students. Students who may have appeared for CAT/ GRE/GMAT& have valid test score can be exempted from EMAT. IIM Vizag also has PGPEx course for students. Candidates who have a min of 3-year Bachelor’s degree with min. 55% marks or equal & who have a minimum of 3 years of full-time work experience at an officer/ executive level or higher; as a professional or as an entrepreneur can apply for admission to the PGPEx programme. Candidates who require a valid CAT/ GMAT/ GRE scores to be considered for admission. Candidates can also choose to apply for PGPEx by opting to take IIMV Test. Shortlisted candidates are required to appear for Personal Interview.

Post Graduate Program for Experienced Professionals (PGPEx) and The Executive Master of Business Administration (EMBA). faqs.answer: Getting into IIM Visakhapatnam is not hard if a proper preparation is done in the initials stage. IIM Vizag admission to the MBA or PGP is entirely based on CAT exam score and percentile. CAT is a highly competitive exam that is a must have to get into the IIMs and other top management colleges in India. A well planned strategy along with the right approach is essential for admission to PGP at IIM Visakhapatnam.Read moreabout the CAT preparation strategy.

faqs.question: What is the common admission procedure at IIM Visakhapatnam?
faqs.answer: Like any other management institute,IIM Visakhapatnam admissionis entirely based on CAT scores for PGP. Candidates have to follow the CAT admission procedure. Whereas, for courses like PGPEX and PhD application can be directly submitted through IIM Visakhapatnam official website. Candidates are then shortlisted for the Interview based on overall profile. The final selection in other programmes offered at IIM Vizag will be made based on a composite score comprising the performance in CAT/ GMAT/ GRE/ IIMV Test, Diversity, Technical Knowledge and Domain Experience, SOP, Professional References and Personal Interview score.

faqs.question: Can I get into IIM Visakhapatnam with 90 percentile?
faqs.answer: IIM Visakhapatnamadmission to the PGDM courses like MBA are conducted through CAT aggregate percentile. For getting into a prestigious IIMs like IIM Bombay, IIM Kharagpur, One need to score a percentile ofmore than 98. However, if you score nearly92 to 95, you will mostly get few IIMs like IIM - Vizag, Jammu, Nagpur, Amritsar, etc. and if you getabove 95percentile, then you can expect a call from better IIMs like Kashipur, Ranchi, etc. So, it is quite obvious that because of stiff competition, you won't get admission into IIMs with a percentile of90. With the growing competition every year, students must target more than 95 percentile for ensuring their chances of selection.

placement_report.college_name: IIM Visakhapatnam Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: IIM Visakhapatnam Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: During, IIM Visakhapatnam placement 2025, the highest package INR 32.5 LPA . While, the average package for PGP was INR 16.4 LPA and INR 16.4 LPA . Further, the top 50% of the batch received an average package of INR 19.5 LPA . The overall median package recorded in 2025 was INR 16 LPA . The placement percentage recorded during the placement drive 2024, 2023 and 2022 was 100%. BFSI was the top recruiting sector in 2025 with placement distribution of 37%. General Management emerged as the top recruiting domain with placement distribution of 26%.

The highest stipend offered to the PGP batch of 2024-26 batch stood at INR 3,50,000 . The average and median stipend recorded this year was INR 69,094 and INR 60,000 . IT & Consulting emerged as the top recruiting sector wherein the recruiters distribution was 33%.
About PGP Batch 2023-25

The PGP Batch of 2023-25 comprised 59% male and 41% female students . 69% of the total students were from Engineering background . Further, students from Commerce, Science, Management and Arts background were 11%, 9%, 5% and 4%, respectively. 27% of the batch was Fresher while the remaining students enrolled had work experience.

description: IIM Visakhapatnam cutoff 2024 is available on this page for MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIM Visakhapatnam CAT cutoff 2024 across different courses and categories. Further updates related to CAT 2025 are provided below:

IIM Vishakhapatnam CAT Cutoff 2024 has been released for MBA admissions. IIM Vishakhapatnam releases two types of Cutoffs- a) Qualifying CAT Cutoff and b) Final CAT Cutoff. To be able to appear for the CAT Final Exam (WAT and PI), candidate must attain a minimum Qualifying Cutoff. Apparently, IIM Vishakhapatnam final CAT cutoff is always higher than the qualifying cutoff. According to the IIM Vishakhapatnam Cutoff 2023, the Overall Qualifying Percentile for the General/EWS category candidates st

IIM Visakhapatnam offers admission to Management courses based on valid CAT scores. IIM Vishakhapatnam Cutoff 2024, based on valid CAT scores has been released for MBA admissions. For IIM Vizag MBA admission, students need to meet both the overall CAT cut off percentile and the IIM Vizag sectional cutoff. Basis the IIM Vishakhapatam cutoff 2024, the overall all-sectional cutoff was 92 percentile for the General AII India category candidates.

For the academic year 2026-28, IIM Visakhapatnam accepts CAT 2025 entrance exam scores for admission to MBA/PGDM courses followed by Group Discussion (GD), Analytical Writing Test (AWT) & Personal Interview (PI). Tabulated below are the important CAT 2025 dates for admission to IIM Visakhapatnam.
IIM Visakhapatnam MBA cutoff 2025 is yet to be released. In the meantime, candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the previous years' CAT cutoff PDFs.

The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around IIM Visakhapatnam rankings.

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, IIM Visakhapatnam has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Management' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Management' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend. In 2025, IIM Visakhapatnam fell 3 ranks to #29 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking. Throughout the preceding two years, the rank has oscillated but is currently stable.

hostel.description: Students are housed in two separate 5-storey buildings which are 3 KM away from campus with a capacity of 60 students each on a double occupancy basis. Institute provides transportation to students for commuting between the Institute and hostels. All the rooms are air conditioned and furnished. Other facilities includes intercom, wi-fi, TV, discussion rooms, dining hall and indoor games facilities like caroms, chess and table tennis.
facilities: Indoor games such as Pool Table, Caroms, Chess, Table tennis etc.

reviews.review_heading: An overview of IIM Visakhapatnam.
reviews.review_text: A hostel is mandatory for every student. The best hostel facility is available on campus. Single-sharing room with AC, beds, and almirah. Study lamps and everything else that will be necessary for the next two years. All hostels have mesmerizing scenic views from their windows. Fridges, washing machines, induction, and clothing drying areas are available on every floor. Food is good in comparison to other foods. Breakfast, lunch, snacks and dinner are being provided, as well as special food on s...

reviews.review_heading: Indian institute of management Visakhapatnam.
reviews.review_text: The campus is newly built with all modern amenities. The vicinity in which the campus is located is quite desolate. Facilities are still under construction, so constant construction noise disturbs. The location is very far from the main city, with limited options for cabs and online orders. Networks like Airtel have issues on campus, but the newly built library has all study materials. I receive a single occupancy room with AC, fan, almirah, cupboard, mattress, a 7-foot-long mirror, a whiteboard...

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very impressive for our courses and departments. 24*7 Wi-Fi is present, labs, classrooms, and the library are fine; there are no other words. Yes, the hostel is pretty good. The mess provides very hygienic varieties of food, although it is costly. Medical facilities and sports/games are available.

reviews.review_heading: IIM Visakhapatnam is a perfect place to pursue a financial degree.
reviews.review_text: As we all know, IIM campuses were well-equipped with all the future amenities. I really miss my campus a lot. The infrastructure of classrooms and hostels were excellent and maintained in a proper and neat manner. The food available was great and hygienic, and all facilities like sports, a medical center, and a supermarket were present inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: College placement is very good.
reviews.review_text: Samaarambh is the annual cultural fest of IIM Visakhapatnam and is conducted in the month of February. There are a lot of books on Managerial subjects available in the library if someone wants to do an in-depth study other than the course material which is provided to them. Other than that there are journals, newspapers and magazines available as well. Even biographies of famous and successful personalities. The classrooms are tidy and have 2 Televisions, and 2 Projectors to view presentations a...

reviews.review_heading: About the campus of Visakhapatnam.
reviews.review_text: I am overwhelmed to share the infrastructure and facilities of IIM Visakhapatnam. It's a beautiful space fully filled with beautiful souls and good vibes only. Events are arranged in great manner, and the students from other colleges participate in such events.

college_info.college_name: IIM Visakhapatnam Scholarship Details

paragraphs: IIM Vizag offers scholarship to the candidates who are financial instable, with an objective of helping candidates to pursue their education. All PGP students with annual household income below INR 6,00,000 are eligible to apply for financial aid. Other students with severe financial difficulties arising from sudden unforeseen circumstances are also considered.A two-step process is included in deciding the number of awardees and the quantum of aid. In the first stage, students are given a Financial-status Score based on four criteria:

Based on this score, some of the students are called for personal interaction with a faculty panel. During the interaction, the faculty panel evaluates the financial need of the student, as well as establishes the genuineness of the details provided by the student in the application, and assigns a financial score. Based on the weighted average of these two scores, applicants are provided 100%, 80%, 60%, 40%, or 20% financial aid.

reviews_list.review_title: I got admission in Polytechnic Kanpur in 2022 in mechanical engineering branch in lateral entry.

review_content.Placements: Government Polytechnic is the best for placement. If you have that aura and the skill, you will easily be placed in any company that visits. There are higher chances you will receive more than 2 offers, and you will get the chance to choose which one is better for you in terms of value for money and according to your skills as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and the building are not really well-maintained, but the education system and the course process are really good and always on the best path. When I talk about infrastructure, it looks like a 90s, old-days college, but now it’s renovated, and some parts still look old and bad.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The real legend Kanpur Polytechnic.

review_content.Placements: 95% students of our college got placed. The highest package is 10 LPA and the lowest is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies of our college are Mother Dairy, L&T, and Prism cement, etc. Junior engineer role is offered in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are good facilities in our college. Labs are good and settled. Classrooms are also hygienic and peaceful. Library is also available in our college. Hostel facilities are well and good. Food quality is good in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Placements are too good.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 60% students got placed from our college. The highest salary package offered was around 3.3lacs per year, the lowest salary package offered around 1.2 lacs per and average is around 2.5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is available in my college. A library is available in the college. Around 11000 books are there in the college library. Everyday, newspapers come to the college. Wi-Fi facility is available in computer lab. Computer lab has good condition.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are highly qualified. Teachers support students to solve their doubts. Semester exams are held two times in a year. 33% are the passing marks. Exam pattern is fixed by BTEUP Lucknow. All the teachers are helpful.

individual_reviews.title: Really, this college is too good.

content.Placements: This college's placement is very high compared to other colleges. The highest placement in the Information Technology branch is 4.5 LPA in 2024, and the lowest package is 1.2 LPA in SOFTPRO COMPANY in 2024. Their average package rate is 2.5 LPA. Many companies visit the college at placement time, like SOFTPRO INDIA, TERAPIA, CLOUDSHOP, etc. The college provides many internship offers.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi facility is available across the whole campus. There are separate labs for every branch. The mess food quality is very good, and the menu is different every day. The menu is chosen by the head of the college. The hostel is available in front of the college. You can study in the library during college hours. Medical facilities are available on the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I got admission in Polytechnic Kanpur in 2022 in mechanical engineering branch in lateral entry.

content.Placements: Government Polytechnic is the best for placement. If you have that aura and the skill, you will easily be placed in any company that visits. There are higher chances you will receive more than 2 offers, and you will get the chance to choose which one is better for you in terms of value for money and according to your skills as well.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and the building are not really well-maintained, but the education system and the course process are really good and always on the best path. When I talk about infrastructure, it looks like a 90s, old-days college, but now it’s renovated, and some parts still look old and bad.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The real legend Kanpur Polytechnic.

content.Placements: 95% students of our college got placed. The highest package is 10 LPA and the lowest is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies of our college are Mother Dairy, L&T, and Prism cement, etc. Junior engineer role is offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: There are good facilities in our college. Labs are good and settled. Classrooms are also hygienic and peaceful. Library is also available in our college. Hostel facilities are well and good. Food quality is good in our college.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Placements are too good.

content.Placements: Approximately 60% students got placed from our college. The highest salary package offered was around 3.3lacs per year, the lowest salary package offered around 1.2 lacs per and average is around 2.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is available in my college. A library is available in the college. Around 11000 books are there in the college library. Everyday, newspapers come to the college. Wi-Fi facility is available in computer lab. Computer lab has good condition.
content.Faculty: The teachers are highly qualified. Teachers support students to solve their doubts. Semester exams are held two times in a year. 33% are the passing marks. Exam pattern is fixed by BTEUP Lucknow. All the teachers are helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Polytechnic College, Kanpur.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a lot of branches. Wi-Fi is not available for students. All labs are not much good. All facilities are average, Buildings are very old. All classrooms are not good. You can easily purchase books from the library. All hostels are available for girls only. There are no hostels for boys because the new buildings are under construction. There is no canteen in our college. Our college does not have a park.

reviews.review_heading: Need to do work on environment.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities were nice,  library, classrooms were okay but environment was very bad. Seniors do ragging very badly. There were no canteens only mess was there with below average food which I couldn't eat since it was not safe at all.
Sports, games was nice. They organize state level sports events.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good and friendly faculty members. It has a good campus.

reviews_list.review_title: The admission process is too boring, so take admission at your own risk.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate at the college is low. The minimum package is INR 2 lacs, or a maximum of INR 4 lacs. Nearly 20–30% of students get placement at our college. The students have preferred to get admission to the university college, not this college, because of the behavior of the college staff and teachers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library is available for study at any time, and all books are available in the library. The Wi-Fi faculty is used only for college teachers and staff. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science ( B.Sc.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with the quality of education and good placements in 2022.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides quality education with placements at top IT companies. I was enrolled in B.Sc. in Statistics. About 70% of students were hired by Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and other IT companies. The highest salary package offered in 2022 was 7.5 LPA, and the minimum was 3.5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are great with more than 50 PCs. Wi-Fi is easily available to each person. There is a special section for statistics in the college library, with many UG and PG books in special and updated editions. The hostel is on the college campus itself, which helps us to save time. The quality and maintenance of the hostel are good. The food quality is excellent. One major problem with the hostel is that there is no canteen in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am totally satisfied with the course curriculum and teachers' teaching process.
reviews.review_text: Computer labs were very advanced and accessible for students throughout the day. Facilities provided by hostels were gardens and CCTV cameras for safety purposes. The quality of the food served in the mess and canteen was very good.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied with teaching and extracurricular activities
reviews.review_text:
All the necessary facilities such as Wi-Fi, computer labs, well maintained classrooms, well stocked libraries and a big parking area for vehicles is available. 
Hostel facility is provided by college, food quality of mess is good and decent size of canteen is present in campus.
Multiple sports grounds are there in college for physical activities.

reviews.review_heading: The admission process is too boring, so take admission at your own risk.
reviews.review_text: The library is available for study at any time, and all books are available in the library. The Wi-Fi faculty is used only for college teachers and staff. In the hostel, the mess was good, but the rooms were not very comfortable. The sports are held on the grounds of the college, and sports teachers are helpful.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the quality of education and good placements in 2022.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are great with more than 50 PCs. Wi-Fi is easily available to each person. There is a special section for statistics in the college library, with many UG and PG books in special and updated editions. The hostel is on the college campus itself, which helps us to save time. The quality and maintenance of the hostel are good. The food quality is excellent. One major problem with the hostel is that there is no canteen in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: If students do not want to waste money, then they can take admission to this institute.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi is available but limited data is provided in this college, like 35 MB per day. Sports are available like basketball, cricket, badminton, archery, boat club, football, and boat racing. Medical facilities are provided in every department. The girls' room is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: It is a college with great placements and guidance.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are very good. The college campus is very fascinating especially the boat club area. When you are bored or want to fresh your mind just go to the KTHM boat club, and you will feel good. The ground is very big and is the best college if you are a sportsman. The canteen is good, but the worst part is that it doesn't serve non-vegetarian food, but still provides hygienic food. College also provides Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with placement guidence, good placement in 2022, Teaching Infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text:
For our course there are separate computer labs available with good facility of Wi-Fi with advanced library and well maintained and digital classrooms are available 
Going to Next question about quality of food serve in canteen is really good, and hygiene is getting maintained there with fresh environment. And college is also on top rank in field of sport and it's encourage every individual to participate in sport activities where all practice material of sports are available with well maintaine...

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college but the placements are depends on grades.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is too good. College providemany facilities for sports students as well as handicapped students.Hostel infrastructure is also secure and food of mess is not too good but ok. College Canteen is too good.also the library facilities of is best they provide reference books as per our requirments

review_content.Placements: Many top companies are recruiting from our course. Our college brings top companies for campus interviews. Roles offered are web developer and graphics designer.

JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Patna has specializations such as PG Diploma specializations in Fashion Design, UG Diploma specializations in Fashion Design, Visual Merchandising, Jewellery Design, Makeup & Beautician, Hair Styling & Grooming.

faqs.question: Which courses are offered by JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Patna?

review_summary.college_name: JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Patna Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Undergraduate Diploma in Fashion and Apparel Design - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the studies offered here.

content.Placements: The institute offers placement starting from 20k. As it is a Diploma course, the salary increases as per the experience. Though the institute organises fashion shows having renowned celebrities which in turn increases the chance to work with big firms.
content.Infrastructure: The institute based in Patna does not have any campus, hostel, or any mess. But in the other big cities, it offers big campus, mess, sports area as well as canteen. The institute offers various activities and educational tours to fashion industries.

admission_process.title: JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Patna Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Patna admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Patna considers scores in BSEB 12th and CBSE 12th for admission to specific courses.JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Patnaoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 months - 3 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.

courses_data.description: JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Patna UG Diplomais offered to candidates at the UG level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the UG Diploma programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 1 month to 3 years programme.

courses_data.name: JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Patna PG Diploma Admission 2025

To complete the JD Institute of Fashion Technology, Patna admission process for the 2025 batch, selected candidates must pay the applicable course fee.

highlights.summary: The KMAT Kerala 2026 first session exam result has been announced for K.M.M. College of Arts and Science admission to the MBA course. Candidates can download their scorecard by logging in to the official website.

reviews_list.review_title: My class and computer labs are fully Wi-Fi supported, and the college looks nice and beautiful.

review_content.Placements: In my college, placements are just good, not overhyped, but they're just okay. Several companies are recruiting from my college through placements. Companies come from both Kerala and outside Kerala. A larger number of students who are interested in coding and technical subjects easily get placed, and the college provides the needed support.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is really good and awesome, just looking like a wow. My class and all computer labs are fully Wi-Fi supported, and the college looks nice and beautiful. My college provides a good and eco-friendly hostel and good canteen facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: My college provides scholarships based on caste.

review_content.Placements: Our college placement rate is 92 percent. The maximum salary is 18 LPA, the average salary is 12 LPA and the minimum wage was 5.5 LPA. Companies like Well Fargo, Deloitte, KPMG, Infosys, TCS, Rinex, and Axis Bank attend our college and offer excellent salary structures for positions like Finance Manager, HR, Digital Marketer, Accounts, Marketing, Sales and Business Analyst for the company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is very good. We have all the necessary facilities, like Wi-Fi, a library, classrooms and labs. The classrooms are equipped with teaching materials, and the hotel office is located in our college. The food at the hotel is healthy and medical facilities are available. Our college has many teams in sports and sporting events are organized where we can compete with other colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Apparel and Fashion Design - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Review of K.M.M. College of Arts and Science.

review_content.Placements: I actually studied B.Sc. psychology here. We had so many awareness classes and workshops related to psychology. Placement in this course is not practically possible. We can have so many good internship opportunities. Psychology is an emerging field in India, so career opportunities are growing quickly.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. The library has so many books that we can refer to. The psychology lab is efficient. The food available in the canteen is of good quality. We have a field for indoor football matches. The libraries will undoubtedly assist you. The computer lab is also in good condition.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It has really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Very few students that I know have been placed. The highest package was 5 LPA, the lowest was 3 LPA, and the average was 4 LPA. IT companies like Inforpark offer jobs, and a very few got direct jobs in IT companies, at Bangalore. Software developed, and application developed roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs were highly developed with every new technology provided. Classrooms were very attractive, which made students focus more. High-quality foods are provided with great extra activities. The timing was also great and very strict so that students could focus more on studies.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College has high placements and college provides add on courses like AI.

content.Placements: 70 percent of students got placed in our college and started to earn in their younger age. They have the ability to do their jobs and are courageous.

content.Faculty: Our college conducts internal exams for our semester exams. Teachers are very friendly, and they teach not only the syllabus but also improve the behaviour and personality of students. Our teaching staff and non-teaching staff teach well, and because of this we wrote our exams well. Our college conducts internal exams before semester exams very strictly.

admission_process.title: K.M.M. College of Arts and Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs:
K.M.M. College of Arts and Science course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theK.M.M. College of Arts and Scienceapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG and PG programmes in fields of Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Design, Humanities and Social Sciences, Science, Banking and Finance and Insurance, and more. To know about the eligibility of K.M.M. College of Arts and Science courses, students can visit the website.

K.M.M. College of Arts and Science fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for K.M.M. College of Arts and Science fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on K.M.M. College of Arts and Science admission:

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs were highly developed with every new technology provided. Classrooms were very attractive, which made students focus more. High-quality foods are provided with great extra activities. The timing was also great and very strict so that students could focus more on studies.

reviews.review_heading: College has high placements and college provides add on courses like AI.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities in our college for studying and for other extracurricular activities. We have technical programs, and they are all at their extreme level. Hostels provide security and time limits. All students behave well and have changed their habits nicely.

reviews.review_heading: My class and computer labs are fully Wi-Fi supported, and the college looks nice and beautiful.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure is really good and awesome, just looking like a wow. My class and all computer labs are fully Wi-Fi supported, and the college looks nice and beautiful. My college provides a good and eco-friendly hostel and good canteen facilities.

reviews.review_heading: My college provides scholarships based on caste.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very good. We have all the necessary facilities, like Wi-Fi, a library, classrooms and labs. The classrooms are equipped with teaching materials, and the hotel office is located in our college. The food at the hotel is healthy and medical facilities are available. Our college has many teams in sports and sporting events are organized where we can compete with other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Review of K.M.M. College of Arts and Science.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The library has so many books that we can refer to. The psychology lab is efficient. The food available in the canteen is of good quality. We have a field for indoor football matches. The libraries will undoubtedly assist you. The computer lab is also in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides average facilities, average placements, and good teaching.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are pretty good. Wi-Fi is pretty fast. We have 3 to 6 labs. Classrooms are big and spacious. You can't expect sports and games. The hostels are not good. Most of my classmates stay in private hostels. The ambiance in the college hostel is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and curriculum. Everything is bad apart from them.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are neat and fresh. They have good environment for studies. There are great computer labs too with all the necessities. The library too is very useful and up to date. The college doesn't have its own hostel, which is a great fallback, as many students have to look for private hostels and accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: The best thing is the friends and the worst thing is that there is no place to enjoy with friends.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is not good, it is like a hospital with a lot of rooms and no outside ground. The canteen is the best thing in this college. The snacks and the food is very delicious and fresh and workers are very kind hearted.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with well-trained teachers.
reviews.review_text: The new block is very good. The new block provides high-speed internet. It has well-maintained classrooms. There is a large football ground near the college. The canteen provides good quality food. The college has a lift facility. There are 2 labs in our college that are computer lab and chemistry lab.

reviews.review_heading: Review of K.M.M. College of Arts and Science.
reviews.review_text: This college has computer IT labs that have all software and a huge number of PCs. Two CCTV cameras are installed in our classroom. Any student can become a member of the library in our college. Our college has a canteen with affordable prices. There is a variety of sports such as football, cricket and others. Moreover, there is a good hostel. Our college has a tiny library, but it publishes six newspapers each day, among which one in English and another one in Malayalam. Classrooms are similar ...

reviews.review_heading: It has decent faculty, nice placements and great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college has a decently built infrastructure with great lab facilities. The labs do have a good internet connection with Wi-Fi support. The classrooms are spacious, and the libraries have a lot of books available, both academic and non-academic varieties. The college hostel is clean, and the college canteen provides good food at a decent amount. Basic medical facilities are available. Sports events, which include football, cricket, basketball, and athletics are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for all type of students. Easily affordable. Students can enjoy the college life.
reviews.review_text: This college provides computer IT labs with all software installed and many computers. Our classroom contains two cctv camera. Our college has a library in which any one can take membership. Our college has a canteen which has low prices and has selection for all sports like football, cricket, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my college life and the new era.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a free Wi-Fi service and smart classrooms. More than 10,000 books are available in our library. The canteen serves many items and students use the canteen to have lunch. The hostel is very clean and has a vast. Each day, a different type and quality of food is served. It charges a budget-friendly rent.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to enjoy your college days, you have to be a hosteller.
reviews.review_text: The college doesn't have its own hostel, but the college owns some buildings, and there are private hostels in the area. You can first join any hostel you want; after a few days, you can move to any hostel you like in no time. Some awesome seniors can help you.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied of faculty members and good infrastructure in the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructures are good. Need more improvements in sports. Mostly promoting only in cricket and football. Library, canteen and labs all are very good and NEET. And medical room also provided in college. Lift facility also available. And also drinking water available in every floor. Now ending machines also started.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Changu Kana Thakur college of Arts, Commerce and Science offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Science and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Sc., B.Com and B.A. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Sc., M.Com and PG Diploma. Changu Kana Thakur college of Arts, Commerce and Science courses are offered to students in offline mode. Further, the fees structure for Changu Kana Thakur college of Arts, Commerce and Science courses stands around INR 16,965 to 84,510.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Accounting and Finanace - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty and education, but dissatisfied with the placement cell.

review_content.Placements: Barely 25-30% of students got placement opportunities that too in departments like telecalling executives, call centers, etc. None of the companies from the big 4 approached this college, small finance companies were available for placements. The top role offered in the course was an accountant.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library was nice and clean and all kinds of books were available. Classrooms are not that good and leakage problems in the rainy season, labs were nice. I didn't reside in the college hostel so I don't know about the hostel, the quality of food available in the canteen was below average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Management studies - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied Because of the Faculty, Supportive Staff, and Teachers; Value for Money.

review_content.Placements: It is the best college as per the placements. The starting package is also good. Teachers are also helpful and guide students very well to prepare for placement interviews. Some of the top companies are TCS and many more. Many of my friends got jobs from my college placements, and now they are in the best positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: The best teacher is available for every course. I would recommend everyone go to this college. There is Wi-Fi in all classes, labs, corridors, etc., for the betterment of students. Neat and clean classrooms, as well as washrooms, ensure good hygiene. The college is maintained by the supervisors and other staff.

review_summary.college_name: Changu Kana Thakur college of Arts, Commerce and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Honestly, it is one of the best colleges.

content.Placements: More than 50-60 percent of students from my course got placements from the college. The lowest package offered is 4.5 LPA. More than 100 companies like IBM, TCS, and Infosys visit the college to offer placements in the required posts like data analyst, cloud architects, data scientist, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really appreciable. There is a good Wi-Fi connection. It has fully air-conditioned labs and a library. There are big classrooms where students can sit properly. It organises the big sports and games fests. Hostels are pretty good, and facilities are really appreciable.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Decent academics and affordable fees, but lacks industry exposure.

content.Placements: About 20-30% of students get placement through the college. The highest package is around 4-5 LPA, and the lowest is 1.5-2 LPA. Recruiters are banking firms and accounting companies like HDFC, ICICI, TCS, and Wipro. Around 40-50% of students secure internships in finance, auditing, Salem, etc.
content.Infrastructure: CKT College has basic classrooms, a library with commerce books, and limited Wi-Fi access. There is no specialized lab for commerce students, but B.Sc. students have a science lab with basic equipment and a computer lab. The college has no hostel, but the canteen offers average food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Accounting and Finanace - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty and education, but dissatisfied with the placement cell.

content.Placements: Barely 25-30% of students got placement opportunities that too in departments like telecalling executives, call centers, etc. None of the companies from the big 4 approached this college, small finance companies were available for placements. The top role offered in the course was an accountant.
content.Infrastructure: The library was nice and clean and all kinds of books were available. Classrooms are not that good and leakage problems in the rainy season, labs were nice. I didn't reside in the college hostel so I don't know about the hostel, the quality of food available in the canteen was below average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management studies - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied Because of the Faculty, Supportive Staff, and Teachers; Value for Money.

content.Placements: It is the best college as per the placements. The starting package is also good. Teachers are also helpful and guide students very well to prepare for placement interviews. Some of the top companies are TCS and many more. Many of my friends got jobs from my college placements, and now they are in the best positions.
content.Infrastructure: The best teacher is available for every course. I would recommend everyone go to this college. There is Wi-Fi in all classes, labs, corridors, etc., for the betterment of students. Neat and clean classrooms, as well as washrooms, ensure good hygiene. The college is maintained by the supervisors and other staff.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty.

content.Placements: There is no placement for Arts in this college. Internship programmes are offered by TCS mostly. Roles offered in this course are professor and civil services. There is a special department of placement in this college. And out of 100% eligible students, 80% got placements.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available all over the classroom. And digital boards are provided by the college. A huge library is present with over 500,000 books available. The library is available for 24/7 for students. A huge ground is present with different sports activities available .

reviews.review_heading: If you just want to study, you can come to this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and well-maintained. The labs, the faculty offices, the study room and Gym all the things are well-maintained and clean. The college is so clean, surrounded by plans and has a big ground where the college team practices and students play sports if they want.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure bad canteen overall it's an okay college.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the college is pretty good I would say and there is Wi-Fi for students but to be honest they never work. There are interactive language labs for English, German, and French and the library is the best part of this college since it's one of the best and the biggest libraries in India at the moment. The canteen is not good at all because of the food and quantity both are bad so I would recommend either bringing your food or eating outside. There are sports available l...

reviews.review_heading: Reviewing my college experience .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, etc. are available. My department's teachers are awesome. They have a bunch of knowledge and experience. They provide everything to understand. There are many books available in the library. If any student wants to study books, it is free of charge in the college library.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good with placements.
reviews.review_text: The computers in labs were very slow, and some did not work. The canteen was very boring. The auditorium was very small, making it very difficult to manage study and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and nice college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, etc. are available. My department’s teachers are awesome. They have a bunch of knowledge and experience. They provide everything to understand. There are many books available in our department. If any student wants to study books then HODs provide them free of cost.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students were placed in campus placements. The highest package was 900000 per annum last year and the lowest was 350000 per annum. Recruiting companies like TCS, Samsung, AWS, and many other small scale companies visit for mass hiring and many startup companies also approach the college. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.
