overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: Institute of Technology and Management, Gorakhpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Institute of Technology and Management, Gorakhpur.

content.Placements: Currently, 40% of students get placed. The average package is around 5-7 LPA. Recruiting companies that came this year for the campus placement drive are Streebro, Edvedha, Jaro Education, Wipro, TCS, Planet Park, etc. Many students are doing internships.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. All classrooms are fully digital. There are AC classrooms and Wi-Fi. The hostel facilities are also good and the very best for girls.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. They are skilled in their subjects but some are freshers. They are very friendly and helpful. The course teacher makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are moderately difficult. If students prepare the subject very well, exams will be easy. Some faculty members of our college are nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: In the college, we can see the new experience and a unique environment, and teachers are cooperative

content.Placements: Placement in 2021 was 100%. The companies that came for placement were Cummins, Wheel India Ltd., Flipkart, etc. The lowest package for the placement was 160,000. The highest role for the placement was Jr. Engineer. Some students got their dream job as they required.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good. For the B. Tech course, the fee is 120,000. For the Polytechnic course, it will be around 100,000. The hostel provides breakfast. The food for every day is different. The feel of the hostel is not so high. The warden comes for regular checks in the hostel.

individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college.

content.Placements: Our college placements were not good. Only a few students were placed in college. Top recruiting companies did not visit our campus. Placements for other courses were so good. The highest salary package offered was 19 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA.

The canteen was excellent.

faqs.answer: TheaverageBTech CSEsalary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Institute of Technology and Management, Gorakhpur.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. All classrooms are fully digital. There are AC classrooms and Wi-Fi. The hostel facilities are also good and the very best for girls.

reviews.review_heading: In the college, we can see the new experience and a unique environment, and teachers are cooperative
reviews.review_text:
College infrastructure is good.
For the B. Tech course, the fee is 120,000.
For the Polytechnic course, it will be around 100,000.
The hostel provides breakfast.
The food for every day is different.
The feel of the hostel is not so high.
The warden comes for regular checks in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: ITM Gorakhpur college Review.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is all over good and enough for students to grow there skills in a good environment with high spec techs. Smart classrooms, smart labs with Ethernet and Wi-Fi connection upto 1gbps. Hostel facility is also good as I myself don't live in hostel, I am a day scholar but what I have listened from my friends from hostel it is preety good and satisfying. Yes sports are also a part of our routine along with the academics and several inter and intra college sport competitions are conducte...

reviews.review_heading: Review about ITM GIDA GORAKHPUR.
reviews.review_text: The classes are well-equipped with smart class features and proper lab facilities. Wi-Fi is available for all students. The library is easily accessible and has a wide range of books. There are two canteens on campus offering hygienic food items. Medical facilities are adequate, and various sports like basketball, volleyball, table tennis, chess, and carrom are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Our college had excellent facilities. The infrastructure was well-equipped. Wi-Fi was available throughout the campus. There were well-equipped labs and classrooms with projectors. Hostels were air-conditioned. The mess provided good food. Various sports activities were conducted in the hostel and premises. The canteen was excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Not so good and not so bad. Average college for average students with average package.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is pretty good in our college.
 Well-equipped labs with every required instruments.
Classroom are air conditioned.
Benches have good quality of wood.
Hostel life is awesome. 
Rooms are big and large.
Food is not so good. 
Medical facilities is available.
Canteen is available.
Sports accessories is available.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Gorakhpur for B.Tech course.
reviews.review_text: In ITM, there are many hostel facilities for both boys and girls separately.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Institute of Technology and Management, Gorakhpur.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. The classrooms are air-conditioned. A library is available with all the required books. The infrastructure is good. A huge ground is available. The campus has good greenery. The hostel facilities are not good. Games and sports facilities are available. A mess and canteen are available. The quality of food is not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied due to management, which was not so good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good and all machines required for labs are present. Hostels have not so good facilities in terms of mess food, Wi-Fi connection and drinking water. But it has an average room with 24X7 electricity availability. Sports and gaming events are negligible.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very stunning and it's awesome as compared to other colleges in this area. Very good place, Wi-Fi available.Classroom with air conditioning. Lab with good facilities. Hostel rooms are so very good. The only problem is hostel food. Otherwise, the hostel is awesome.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with less fee and good education.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available here are canteen, hostel, transport, library and 24x7 internet. In our college hostel, the quality of facilities offered in the canteen and mess is above average. For sports and games, there are proper grounds and courts. There are emergency and normal medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college which only focuses on studies.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi enabled labs in our college are good. Classrooms are in bad condition. The entire campus is under CCTV surveillance. No water supply (clean water) facility. The sports facility is average. Only cricket and basketball are available here. The library is pathetic with no availability of the latest edition books. Canteen is average and lacks proper maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, infrastructure, and environment of the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a Wi-Fi facility. There are labs for all departments of B.Tech and computer labs for B.Pharma. Even there is a room for medical emergencies equipped with all major medical equipment and medicines. There are smart classrooms enabled with Wi-Fi connection. There are hostels for both boys and girls with all facilities. There are playground and courts for sports like badminton, tennis, and football.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good enough. Free Wi-Fi facility was available on our campus. Classrooms, laboratory and libraries were good. The library had a good collection of books and magazines. Students were also encouraged to take part in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: It has the best infrastructure in Gorakhpur, and also the placements are very good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge compared to other colleges. It has all labs for all branches, and they are air-conditioned. Classrooms are well-furnished. The campus is lush green. The canteen is large enough to accommodate students and teachers.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Khalsa college commerce block.

review_content.Placements: The highest package being offered by college placement is 10-15 lacs per annum and the lowest is 5 lacs. This college is linked up with nearby cities like Chandigarh, Kharar, Mohali, Ludhiana, and Rajpura for the placements and other cities too, but I know only these ones.
review_content.Infrastructure: The commerce block is well maintained and infrastructure is very attractive. This building has 5 floors, including a basement. Each floor has halls for meetings and presentations that are used by teachers for examining the students. Juice bar is also available to the college. The hostel facility is far away from the college for which college vans are provided, but hostels are not so good .

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Appropriate Review of KCP.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in my course. The highest was 240,000 and the lowest was 120,000. The average package was 180,000. MNCs and corporate sectors recruited students. 10% of students were placed for internships. Top roles vary due to the different job profiles offered in placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure like Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library were well maintained, and cleanliness was promoted. I did not opt for the hostel, but some of my colleagues and friends used to tell me that the the food quality and hostel mess were average, as per the price we were paying for it.

individual_reviews.title: A good place to secure your future.

content.Placements: About 50% of students will be placed. They offer good range of salary packages for different streams with different qualifications. They help students to get a job in corporate and government sectors as well which are quite good and secure jobs, I think.
content.Infrastructure: We have great number of classes. Each department has its own computer lab and other labs. Each stream of books is available at library. Library has AC facility. There is a mess and canteen with a good sitting area and electricity supply also there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am completely satisfied with my college due to all the good quality services.

content.Placements: Students who pass with a minimum of 60% can get placements. The average package offered in my course is 2.75 LPA. Companies from Chandigarh, Amritsar, Jalandhar, Gurdaspur, etc., are the top recruiting companies for my course. Students with a minimum of 60% can get internships from my course.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities and infrastructure are available in my college. All facilities like free Wi-Fi connection, labs, library, etc., are available in my college. Good quality food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports, games, etc., are available in my college.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Leadership Development - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Khalsa college commerce block.

content.Placements: The highest package being offered by college placement is 10-15 lacs per annum and the lowest is 5 lacs. This college is linked up with nearby cities like Chandigarh, Kharar, Mohali, Ludhiana, and Rajpura for the placements and other cities too, but I know only these ones.
content.Infrastructure: The commerce block is well maintained and infrastructure is very attractive. This building has 5 floors, including a basement. Each floor has halls for meetings and presentations that are used by teachers for examining the students. Juice bar is also available to the college. The hostel facility is far away from the college for which college vans are provided, but hostels are not so good .

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Appropriate Review of KCP.

content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in my course. The highest was 240,000 and the lowest was 120,000. The average package was 180,000. MNCs and corporate sectors recruited students. 10% of students were placed for internships. Top roles vary due to the different job profiles offered in placements.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure like Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library were well maintained, and cleanliness was promoted. I did not opt for the hostel, but some of my colleagues and friends used to tell me that the the food quality and hostel mess were average, as per the price we were paying for it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Maths - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good and clean. Services are great. Staff behavior was excellent and helpful.

content.Placements: The college has a placement cell, but there are low chances of placement. You'll need to do an M.A. after completing your bachelor's for good placement. Teachers are very helpful in all matters; you can share any problem with them. The department is very cool.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a hostel for girls that is very good and clean. Food service is very hygienic. Rooms are clean. The environment is full of greenery. The hostel has a bus service for picking up and dropping off students at college on time. The hostel staff is very good.

reviews.review_heading: A good place to secure your future.

reviews.review_heading: I am completely satisfied with my college due to all the good quality services.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure are available in my college. All facilities like free Wi-Fi connection, labs, library, etc., are available in my college. Good quality food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports, games, etc., are available in my college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Khalsa college commerce block.
reviews.review_text: The commerce block is well maintained and infrastructure is very attractive. This building has 5 floors, including a basement. Each floor has halls for meetings and presentations that are used by teachers for examining the students. Juice bar is also available to the college. The hostel facility is far away from the college for which college vans are provided, but hostels are not so good .

reviews.review_heading: Appropriate Review of KCP.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure like Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library were well maintained, and cleanliness was promoted. I did not opt for the hostel, but some of my colleagues and friends used to tell me that the the food quality and hostel mess were average, as per the price we were paying for it.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good and clean. Services are great. Staff behavior was excellent and helpful.
reviews.review_text: The college has a hostel for girls that is very good and clean. Food service is very hygienic. Rooms are clean. The environment is full of greenery. The hostel has a bus service for picking up and dropping off students at college on time. The hostel staff is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in comparison to other private colleges in Patiala.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided a Wi-Fi facility, but it was password protected. Labs were for expensive courses, and there was no availability of sports equipment for students other than sportspeople. There were no medical services or games. There was a mess for girls. There was no hostel for boys, and the canteen was overpriced.

reviews.review_heading: Khalsa college is the best college.
reviews.review_text: Khalsa College, Patiala is a famous college. Computer labs and all other subject labs, library, and Wi-Fi were available in the college. The college had smart classrooms. Hostel facilities were good. Hostel rooms were well maintained. The quality of the food served in the mess and canteen was also good. For sports and games, a ground and coaches were available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The college had good teaching staff members, excellent infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college had an excellent infrastructure as there were different departments for different streams such as the commerce department, science department, arts and humanities department, and music department. Apart from this, there were other facilities like a canteen, juice bar, and for the commerce department, there was an elevator too.

reviews.review_heading: It is a fantastic college in Patiala region.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-fi enabled. There are many labs for every field of various courses like agriculture, physics, food processing and many other courses. Our hostel is the best hostel in Patiala, and it has the best mess for both the college and hostel. Canteens are the best juice points and cafe. Sports and games along with NCC and NSS are provided.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because of its faculty and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were the best. There were labs connected with wi-fi and updated systems. Sports meet was organised every year and in canteen food quality was best and taste so good. The department is very good and beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: The life of khalsa college Patiala.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is amendable also it is very nice and the ambiance of the college relaxes my mind but there is no jostel for college students who have come across from different states they have to take outer PG and rooms the Wi-Fi availability and the classrooms, library are very fine they are very quiet and are time to time reconstructed.

reviews.review_heading: To Be Honest Review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is super it is both vintage look like and are department of Commerce and management is newly so they designed like a modern building yes in this in our college free Wi-Fi is available many Science labs and classrooms and librarian also a well maintained the hostel of a college is good it provides good quality of food which is reaching nutritions and vitamins and medical facilities are also given to students to take roll in sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for MBA students.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were available such as canteen, computer laboratory, science laboratory, library, playground, etc. Hostel facilities were better. The food served in the hostel was decent. Electricity facility was average.

highlights.summary: International School of Design, Surat is a private institute and is located in Surat, Gujarat. International School of Design, Surat courses are offered to students at the UG, Certificate and After 10th levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. International School of Design, Surat offers a total of 27 courses in streams such as Design and Animation. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.Sc., B.Des, After 10th Diploma, UG Diploma and Certificate. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Fashion Design, Graphic Design, Jewellery Design, Textile Design and UI / UX. Apart from this, the International School of Design, Surat campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

college_info.intro: Sir JJ College of Architecture popular programme is B.Arch. B.Arch students are taught the Theory & Design of Structures, Environmental Studies, Architectural Representation & Detailing, & several subjects. B.Arch students find jobs in companies like Gaursons India, Clinical Medical Center Osijek, Arris Design Studio LLP, and others. Today the Architecture course students are working as Assistant Professors, Landscape Architects, Project Managers, Architectural Designers Urban Planners, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Sir JJ College of Architecture and their respective eligibility and fee:

placements.overview:
Sir JJ College of Architecture placements 2026 will be updated here once out. The highest and average package recorded during JJ College of Architecture placements in past was 18 LPA and 8 LPA. The College has the record of placing 80% students and offering internships to 90% students. Some of the top roles offered in recent past were Assistant Professor, Project Manager, Architectural Designer, Landscape Architect and Urban Planner.

As per some media reports, the highest and average package recorded during the placement drive 2024 was 3.6 LPA and 2.5 LPA. JJ College of Architecture is visited by top companies for placements like DLF India, IMK Architects, Arris Design Studio LLP, etc. The below-mentioned are the Sir JJ College of Architecture placement statistics:

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college offers the best placements in companies.

review_content.Placements: Above 80% of the students of our college get placed. The highest salary offered is of 1.80 per month, and the lowest salary offered is of Rs. 75,000 per month. The average salary offered is of Rs. 35,000 per month. Google offered the highest salary package, and some multinational companies offered the lowest salary package. In our college, more than 90% of the students get an internship from our course in the best companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: There were many Wi-Fi routers available in our college. Best labs and best smart classrooms are provided. There are three libraries available in our college. Even the best facilities are provided for sports. Occasionally every year, many games are organised for students. Our college is the best.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: A very good college, and it is great for aspiring architects.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in architecture colleges, and it applies for JJ as well. But the professors allow students to work with them or help with internships and placements since you have to look for a firm. Architecture colleges do not provide placements usually, but students do get jobs, especially a student from JJ.
review_content.Infrastructure: It's a 100-years old college hence the infrastructure is very old, but it is very good. The classrooms are airy and have nice fittings for architects. There is no Wi-Fi facility, and the washrooms are clean. We have a ground to play games, and there is an amazing auditorium. All in all, the infrastructure is great for architects.

review_summary.college_name: Sir JJ College of Architecture Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it's a good college for B.Arch.

content.Placements: Top companies like Gaursons India, Shilpa Architects, DLF, RSP Architects Limited, etc., visited the college. The highest salary package offered was 18 LPA, and the average was 8 LPA. It was for the role of design architect. Roles such as assistant professor, project manager, architectural designer, landscape architect, urban planner, etc., were offered to students. Summer internships were also offered to students in construction designing.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel rooms are quite good and spacious. The mess food is also very good. Other facilities that are offered to students are laundry, water supply, electricity, internet connection, parking lot, stationery shop, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Campus life is good, and it is in the lap of nature.

content.Placements: Placements are not directly provided by the college. One needs to find out by oneself, and getting hired is depends on the quality of the portfolio you make in the period of 5 years. At the start, one gets a salary of Rs. 2,000 per month. A top role offered is a junior architect.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides quite spacious classrooms. It is surrounded by lush green nature. It has British architecture. One will love the cool atmosphere of the campus. There is a playground for annual activities, etc. The quality of food served in the canteen is not up to the mark. Recently, it has painted canteen, and it totally looks new.

Even the best facilities are provided for sports. Occasionally every year, many games are organised for students. Our college is the best.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: A very good college, and it is great for aspiring architects.

content.Placements: There are no placements in architecture colleges, and it applies for JJ as well. But the professors allow students to work with them or help with internships and placements since you have to look for a firm. Architecture colleges do not provide placements usually, but students do get jobs, especially a student from JJ.
content.Infrastructure: It's a 100-years old college hence the infrastructure is very old, but it is very good. The classrooms are airy and have nice fittings for architects. There is no Wi-Fi facility, and the washrooms are clean. We have a ground to play games, and there is an amazing auditorium. All in all, the infrastructure is great for architects.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Sir J. J. College of Architecture

content.Placements: We have placements for our internship, unlike any other college in our course. Around 60-70% students get placed with the stipend of minimum Rs. 5,000. The maximum stipend can go up to around Rs. 15,000. Around 20 companies came in to participate. This year will be the first year for placements of graduate students.
content.Infrastructure: We have a material testing lab. A fully functioning computer lab with LAN connection. We do not have a hostel on the campus. We have a sports room and a sports council which conduct a sports fest. Wi-Fi can be provided in college and there is a scope. We would also like a plotter to get our everyday prints from.

admission_overview.title: Sir JJ College of Architecture Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Sir J.J College of Architecture admissions are offered mainly based on scores secured in the accepted entrance exams. The college offers BArch at the UG level and M.Arch at the PG level. Sir J.J College of Architecture is affiliated to University of Mumbai. The application form has to be submitted enclosed with documents to the admission cell. The college accepts students for its BArch course based on JEE Main/ NATA. While PGETA exam is accepted for M.Arch admissions. Shortlisted students need to appear for porfolio evaluation and Personal Interview rounds. Interested students can read the following sections to know about the courses and admission process for Sir J.J College of Architecture.

eligibility_selection.title: Sir JJ College of Architecture Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Sir J.J. College of Architecture course admissions are subject to fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. Students are offered one BArch course and two M.Arch specialisations in full-time mode. Aspirants need to clear the eligibility and selection criteria to get admission in the college. For UG course admission, Class 12 with relevant subjects is required. To get admission in PG courses, Bachelor's degree is required. Students need to submit the scores of any of the accepted exams - JEE Main/ NATA for BArch and PGETA for M.Arch. At the time of application, a CV and portfolio also needs to be provided.

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics and English as the main subjects
Bachelor's degree in relevant field from a recognised university

faqs.answer: Yes, the college of architecture, Sir J.J accepts students with 50+ percent of aggregate in class 12 with PCM and English. Getting a score of 75% qualifies you but there has to be valid entrance test score as well. It is not only the board marks that are used to get admission. Academic as well as entrance requirements should be met.

admission_process.title: Sir JJ College of Architecture Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: TheSir J.J. College of Architecture admission processcan be completed both online and offline. Students are selected based on academic merit + entrance exam scores.Students should have requisite qualification by clearing exams approved by the college. Interested students can follow the steps below to complete the process ofSir J.J. College of Architecture admission:
1: Application Process

Candidates who desire to apply for admission are required to possess a valid JEE Main (Paper-II), NATA or MHT CET.Besides taking up these entrance tests, the students should also take up the application on the portal of the CET.Students can apply online after the application portal goes live. Alternatively, students can go to the college campus with required documents and submit the form offline. The documents are to be self-attested.Sir J.J. College of Architecture admission team will guide you through the process.
2: Shortlisting

Shortlisting is done on a candidate basis by finding out the scores in the entrance examination.The candidates who score equal to or above the cut off marks stand a chance of being re-admitted.TheSir J.J. College of Architectureselection processis as below:
3: Admission Confirmation

Students pay an admission fee that is required once they have been selected to ensure that the seat is taken.TheSir J.J. College of Architecture feeshas to be paid within the given time.Students need to report at the allocated time for verification of documents.

faqs.answer: In order to get into Sir JJ College of Architecture under BArch, the candidates should have passed Class 12 and obtained a minimum of 50% with the subjects Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics. Candidates should also hold valid marks for JEE Main (Paper-II), NATA, or MHT CET. Admission is also based on merit list and marks in entrance examination. Shortlisted candidates get through by paying fees for admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria to get admission at JJ College of Architecture?
faqs.answer: Candidate must have passed Class 12 examination with at least 50% aggregate marks in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics and also at least 50% aggregate marks at Class 12 examination. courses_data.name: Sir JJ College of Architecture M.Arch Admission 2026
courses_data.description: The M.Arch course at Sir JJ College of Architecture is available to students with a B.Arch degree which is recognised by the council of architecture.Its admissions are carried out in three phases, such as the PGETA entrance exam, a Statement of Purpose/ CV and Portfolio is submitted. The final round of selection is a round of Personal Interview. The total seat intake for the course is 28. Students can pursue the course in two specialisations -Metropolitan ArchitectureandArchitecture Education.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the M.Arch programme at Sir JJ College of Architecture?
faqs.answer: To pursue MArch course at JJ College of Architecture, students should hold BArch degree. Students should also qualify the PGETA entrance exam with minimum 50 percentile.

faqs.question: What are the components of M.Arch admission process at Sir JJ College of Architecture?
faqs.answer: The three main processes involved in the M.Arch admission process include pass the PGETA exam: clearing the paper includes passing the PGETA entrance exam which is conducted by the Design Council; filing an application form: including a Statement of Purpose and Portfolio (100 marks); and finally, attending an interview (200 marks).This is a total of 300 marks.The final round of interview is done only where Stage 2 candidates have been shortlisted.

faqs.question: What documents are required during the M.Arch application submission at Sir JJ College of Architecture?
faqs.answer: While applying for the M.Arch at Sir JJ College of Architecture, PGETA clearance certificate, academic mark sheets and certificates are required.A statement of Purpose and a digital portfolio should also be submitted.The combination of such components has 100 marks in total.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in JJ College of Architecture?
faqs.answer:
JJ College of Architecture is one of the most prestigious architecture colleges in India and has a very limited number of seats. In order to increase your chances of getting admission to JJ College of Architecture, you should:
- Score well in NATA and Class 12
- Prepare well for the college's entrance exam
- Apply for admission early
- Be prepared to compete with a large number of other qualified applicants.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to Sir JJ College of Architecture?
faqs.answer: Students should pass Class 12 in the specified subjects and secure valid marks in NATA, JEE Main (Paper-II), or MHT CET for admission to Sir JJ College of Architecture. Students should apply through the CET portal.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Sir JJ College of Architecture?
faqs.answer: No, Sir JJ College of Architecture does not provide direct admission to its BArch course. Applicants have to clear one of the recognised entrance tests such as NATA, JEE Main (Paper-II), or MHT CET. Admission is given on the basis of merit list and counselling. All these steps are mandatory for admission.

faqs.question: Can I take admission in B.Arch at Sir JJ College of Architecture without JEE Mains?
faqs.answer: Yes, admissions to the BArch course at Sir JJ College of Architecture are possible without JEE Main scores. The other accepted entrance exams are MHT CET,NATA, and others. Candidates willing to get admission at Sir JJ College of Architecture must prepare well in adavance for the MHT CET exams. Practice as many question papers as possible for a successful admission to various UG courses.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college for B.Arch.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are quite good and spacious. The mess food is also very good. Other facilities that are offered to students are laundry, water supply, electricity, internet connection, parking lot, stationery shop, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life is good, and it is in the lap of nature.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides quite spacious classrooms. It is surrounded by lush green nature. It has British architecture. One will love the cool atmosphere of the campus. There is a playground for annual activities, etc. The quality of food served in the canteen is not up to the mark. Recently, it has painted canteen, and it totally looks new.

reviews.review_heading: Our college offers the best placements in companies.
reviews.review_text: There were many Wi-Fi routers available in our college. Best labs and best smart classrooms are provided. There are three libraries available in our college. Even the best facilities are provided for sports. Occasionally every year, many games are organised for students. Our college is the best.

reviews.review_heading: A very good college, and it is great for aspiring architects.
reviews.review_text: It's a 100-years old college hence the infrastructure is very old, but it is very good. The classrooms are airy and have nice fittings for architects. There is no Wi-Fi facility, and the washrooms are clean. We have a ground to play games, and there is an amazing auditorium. All in all, the infrastructure is great for architects.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: SMRK BK AK Mahila Mahavidyalaya offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce and Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ). At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Sc., B.Com and B.A. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Com and M.A. SMRK BK AK Mahila Mahavidyalaya courses are offered to students in Full Time mode.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Management Studies (BMS) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and helpful teachers but placements could be better.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 20-30% of placements are for students securing graduation. The highest package is 3 LPA, and the lowest salary is Rs 30,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are ICICI, L&T Finance Services, Tata, and LIC. There are other educational and training placements too for eg Race Academy, Bachpan Play School, Little Millennium School, and Ashoka Universal School.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-maintained and spacious. Labs are also provided to the students depending on the courses like science as computer-based. Wi-Fi is available for the departments. Library also has a good and decent collection of books, journals, and some reference books too.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: There are placements in my college but none of my friends got that.

review_content.Placements: There were 40 students in our batch. No salary packages were offered in the course. No companies were recruiting. No one got the internship. No roles are offered in the course. This college is good for girls only. They do not take much time to get admitted. The office staff is also helpful.
review_content.Infrastructure: The studying areas are clean and in good condition. Library is good in the college. There is a big ground for playing sports. Food is also provided. Indoor and outdoor games can be played in the college.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful in college. They also help in extracurricular activities like teaching different extra computer animations and videos. It was not so tough to clear the semester exams because teachers help you in your studies and give you the knowledge to grow further for your future.

individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and helpful teachers but placements could be better.

content.Placements: Approximately 20-30% of placements are for students securing graduation. The highest package is 3 LPA, and the lowest salary is Rs 30,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are ICICI, L&T Finance Services, Tata, and LIC. There are other educational and training placements too for eg Race Academy, Bachpan Play School, Little Millennium School, and Ashoka Universal School.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-maintained and spacious. Labs are also provided to the students depending on the courses like science as computer-based. Wi-Fi is available for the departments. Library also has a good and decent collection of books, journals, and some reference books too.
